# Lekke Logic

> AI-native agency based in Johannesburg, South Africa. We design, build, and operate AI systems, custom software, and decision systems for fintech, SaaS, and media teams. Discovery in days. Production in weeks.

Lekke Logic (Pty) Ltd is an AI-native technology agency offering seven productised services: AI Audit & Roadmap, AI Workflow Automation, Document & Knowledge Agents, Decision Systems, Custom AI Software & Tools, UI/UX Design, and Marketing Sites. We work with South African and global clients, with a focus on regulated industries, particularly fintech and financial services compliance (FICA, KYC, AML).

Engagement model: two tiers across most services, **Lean** (SMEs) and **Premium** (enterprise), with transparent pricing in ZAR (excludes VAT) and no hidden fees. Most engagements start with our productised AI Audit (R15k to R30k, 1 to 2 weeks).

## Pages

- [Home](https://lekkelogic.co.za/): Overview, positioning, and the seven services
- [Services](https://lekkelogic.co.za/services.html): All 7 services with Lean vs Premium pricing tiers
- [Capabilities](https://lekkelogic.co.za/capabilities.html): Other capabilities (Managed IT, Business Development, Advertising, E-Commerce, generic CMS) for existing clients and bundled engagements
- [Pricing](https://lekkelogic.co.za/pricing.html): Full price table for the seven services, FAQ, and engagement explainer
- [Process](https://lekkelogic.co.za/process.html): Our 4-phase delivery process with timelines
- [Work](https://lekkelogic.co.za/work.html): Case study index (new case studies in progress)
- [About](https://lekkelogic.co.za/about.html): Team, principles, and operating point of view
- [Writing](https://lekkelogic.co.za/blog.html): Articles on AI-in-production, agency operations, and South African fintech
- [Contact](https://lekkelogic.co.za/contact.html): Book a 30-minute discovery call

## The seven services (with price ranges in ZAR, excludes VAT)

1. **AI Audit & Roadmap**, R15k to R30k flat fee. Productised 1 to 2 week engagement. Front door for most builds.
2. **AI Workflow Automation**, R5k to R75k (Lean) / R60k to R350k (Premium) per workflow. Make, Zapier, n8n, custom integrations.
3. **Document & Knowledge Agents**, R40k to R250k per build. RAG, classification, routing, compliance-ready audit logs.
4. **Decision Systems**, R20k to R150k (Lean) / R80k to R600k+ (Premium). Pipelines, dashboards, agentic anomaly detection. (Renamed from Data & BI.)
5. **Custom AI Software & Tools**, R50k to R300k per project. Next.js apps with Claude agents baked in.
6. **UI/UX Design**, R10k to R60k (Lean) / R50k to R250k (Premium). Web, mobile, internal tools, build-ready handoff.
7. **Marketing Sites**, R40k to R120k per project. Production-quality Next.js sites in 2 to 3 weeks.

## Key facts

- **Founded:** 2024
- **HQ:** Johannesburg, South Africa
- **Specialisation:** AI systems in production, fintech compliance automation, custom software
- **Booking window:** Currently booking Q3/Q4 2026 engagements
- **Contact:** hello@lekkelogic.co.za
- **Scheduling:** https://calendly.com/nqobile-lekkelogic/30min

## What makes us different

We are an AI-native, full-stack agency: one team handles strategy, design, code, data, and operations. We are not a platform vendor, we build the specific system that does the specific job in your stack, on your data, with the constraints your business actually has.
